title: Strait of Hormuz must remain closed as 'tool to pressure enemy,' Iran's new supreme leader says
summary_full: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has said all U.S. military bases in the Middle East should close immediately as those bases will be attacked.
summary_public: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has said all U.S. military bases in the Middle East should close immediately as those bases will be attacked.
